cases.prompt: 우리 제품 해외에 팔고 싶어. 수출하려면 바이어 어떻게 찾고 인코텀즈는?

assertions.text: Guides market selection and buyer discovery (KOTRA/전시회/Alibaba/tradeKorea).

cases.prompt: How do I export my product and find overseas buyers as a Korean SMB?

assertions.text: Provides a step-by-step export guide, decision-focused (no backend).
